root.sql:
select sc_mem_m_chang_request.membership_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_chang_request.membership_no) mem_name ,sc_mem_m_chang_request.operate_date ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_mem_m_chang_request.operate_date) operate_date_tdate ,sc_mem_m_chang_request.entry_id ,sc_mem_m_member_work_info.salary_amount
,sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.membership_no loan_contract ,'SHR' type_request ,case when sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_new > sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_old then 'เพิ่มส่งหุ้น '||trim(to_char(sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_old,'999,999.00')) when sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_new < sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_old then 'ลดส่งหุ้น '||trim(to_char(sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_old,'999,999.00')) when sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_new = sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_old then (CASE sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.drop_status_last WHEN '0' THEN 'ชำระปกติ' WHEN '1' THEN 'งดส่ง' ELSE 'ชำระปกติ' END) end value_old_text
,case when sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_new > sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_old or sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_new < sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_old then trim(to_char(sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_new,'999,999.00')) else (CASE sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.drop_status WHEN '0' THEN 'ชำระปกติ' WHEN '1' THEN 'งดส่ง' ELSE 'ชำระปกติ' END) end value_new_text
,(CASE sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.drop_status_last WHEN '1' THEN 0 ELSE sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_old END) as value_old ,(CASE sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.drop_status WHEN '1' THEN 0 ELSE sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.shr_value_new END) as value_new ,sc_mem_m_chang_request.document_no ,coalesce( sc_mem_m_chang_request.approve_id , ' ' ) as approve_id
from sc_mem_m_chang_request ,sc_mem_m_chg_share_det ,sc_mem_m_member_work_info
where sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no = sc_mem_m_chang_request.membership_no and sc_mem_m_chg_share_det.document_no = sc_mem_m_chang_request.document_no and sc_mem_m_chang_request.approve_status <> '3' --and sc_mem_m_chang_request.operate_date between to_date('03/02/2020','DD/MM/YYYY') and to_date('03/02/2020','DD/MM/YYYY') and sc_mem_m_chang_request.operate_date between ('!operate_date_1!')::timestamp and ('!operate_date_2!')::timestamp
union
select sc_mem_m_chang_request.membership_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_chang_request.membership_no) mem_name ,sc_mem_m_chang_request.operate_date ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_mem_m_chang_request.operate_date) operate_date_tdate ,sc_mem_m_chang_request.entry_id ,sc_mem_m_member_work_info.salary_amount
,sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.loan_contract ,'LON' type_request ,case when sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.period_payment_new > sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.period_payment_old then 'เพิ่มส่งหนี้ '||trim(to_char(sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.period_payment_old,'999,999.00')) when sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.period_payment_new < sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.period_payment_old then 'ลดส่งหนี้ '||trim(to_char(sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.period_payment_old,'999,999.00')) when sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.period_payment_new = sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.period_payment_old then (CASE sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.drop_status_last WHEN '0' THEN 'ชำระปกติ' WHEN '1' THEN 'งดต้นและดอก' WHEN '2' THEN 'งดต้น' WHEN '3' THEN 'งดดอก' ELSE 'ชำระปกติ' END) end value_old_text ,case when sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.period_payment_new > sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.period_payment_old or sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.period_payment_new < sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.period_payment_old then trim(to_char(sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.period_payment_new,'999,999.00')) else (CASE sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.drop_status WHEN '0' THEN 'ชำระปกติ' WHEN '1' THEN 'งดต้นและดอก' WHEN '2' THEN 'งดต้น' WHEN '3' THEN 'งดดอก' ELSE 'ชำระปกติ' END) end value_new_text
,(CASE sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.drop_status_last WHEN '0' THEN sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.period_payment_old ELSE 0 END) as value_old ,(CASE sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.drop_status WHEN '0' THEN sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.period_payment_new ELSE 0 END) as value_new
,sc_mem_m_chang_request.document_no ,coalesce( sc_mem_m_chang_request.approve_id , ' ' ) as approve_id
from sc_mem_m_chang_request ,sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det ,sc_mem_m_member_work_info
where sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no = sc_mem_m_chang_request.membership_no and sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.document_no = sc_mem_m_chang_request.document_no and sc_mem_m_chang_request.approve_status <> '3' --and sc_mem_m_chang_request.operate_date between to_date('03/02/2020','DD/MM/YYYY') and to_date('03/02/2020','DD/MM/YYYY') and sc_mem_m_chang_request.operate_date between ('!operate_date_1!')::timestamp and ('!operate_date_2!')::timestamp /*where*/ order by operate_date,type_request,document_no
